rulings.Case Title: AARON SHEN VS. ANDREW H COLE et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 24, 2007, LINE 15, DEFENDANT ANDREW COLE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PAY OR QUIT NOTICE. IMPROPER AS TO CCP 1161. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CURE OR QUIT BASED ON HABITUAL LATE PAYMENT. 30 OR 60 DAY NOTICE REQUIRED UNDER CIVIL CODE 1946. OVERRULED AS TO "CURE OR QUIT" RE: USE OF ILLEGAL DRUGS. 3 DAYS NOTICE PROPER FOR NUISANCE UNLAWFUL DETAINER UNDER CCP 1161. OVERRULED AS TO CURE OR QUIT RE: FAILURE TO MAKE CHECK PAYABLE TO MASTER TENANT. 3 DAYS NOTICE PROPER FOR BREACH OF COVENANT. CCP 1161. OVERRULED AS TO CURE OR QUIT RE: HOSTILE ENVIRONMENT. 3 DAYS NOTICE PROPER FOR NUISANCE. CCP 1161. =(302/JKS/AY)
